title: A high-band request that can't be answered is masked as 'saved as an idea'
discoveredBy: operator (live /ask on the home-lab bot after BUG-061-008 P1-P5 shipped)

rootCause.summary: open_knowledge (requires_provenance) produced an OK answer with no citations. The provenance gate correctly refuses the uncited body but rewrites to Status=StatusSavedAsIdea + CaptureRoute=true with ErrorCause unset; canonicalizeSuccessfulCaptureResponse then overwrites the gate's honest body ('I don't have a sourced answer for that.') with the generic capture acknowledgement ('saved as an idea — i'll surface it later.'). BUG-061-008 P1 only guarded NON-OK outcomes, so this OK-but-uncited path was left intact — and its P2 test asserted the OK+no-sources case SHOULD return saved_as_idea, test-locking the reported behavior. An honest open_knowledge refusal renderer exists but is bypassed (it fires only when ErrorCause matches a spec-064 RefusalCause, which the gate leaves empty) and even it appends a confusing '(saved as idea)' suffix.

resolution: Enforce INV-HB-REFUSAL: 'saved as an idea' is band-LOW-only. SCOPE-01 makes the provenance gate refuse into an honest shape (StatusUnavailable + new ErrNoGroundedAnswer + honest body + CaptureRoute=false) uniformly across every requires_provenance scenario. SCOPE-02 scopes canonicalizeSuccessfulCaptureResponse to band-low (band-high residual StatusSavedAsIdea is converted to the honest refusal). SCOPE-03 flips the BUG-061-008 OK-no-sources assertion to honest-refusal and extends the cross-path invariant test so a single test proves no band-high requires_provenance path can render the capture acknowledgement (class-killer). SCOPE-04 renders the honest body verbatim for ErrNoGroundedAnswer, drops the '(saved as idea)' suffix from the open_knowledge refusal renderer, reword the 5 refusal cause strings, and upgrades G021 refusal-vs-answer distinguishability from a user-visible string to a structural (Status/ErrorCause) contract across Telegram + WhatsApp. SCOPE-05 diagnoses + routes the grounding gap and encodes the invariant in docs + the review checklist.
codeVsDeployment: code-only (not yet implemented). Will be built (build --target self-hosted), operator-cosign-signed, and deployed on-host (local-operator promote/apply under sudo -n) to the home-lab bot after all scopes are green, matching the BUG-061-008 deploy recipe.

deployment.operatorSmokeTestPending: on Telegram, send `/ask <a question the bot cannot ground>` and confirm the reply is an honest 'I don't have a sourced answer for that.' (never 'saved as an idea'); confirm a genuine dropped thought (unrouted) still replies 'saved as an idea — i'll surface it later.'

scopes.title: Provenance gate refuses honestly (not as a capture)

supersedes: specs/061-conversational-assistant/bugs/BUG-061-008-execution-errors-masked-as-saved-as-idea SCN-061-008-03 (OK+no-sources -> saved_as_idea) is replaced by OK+no-sources -> honest StatusUnavailable refusal
